Hampstead Parish Church

18 April, 2026

Programme

Passacaglia on a theme of Dunstable
John Weaver (1937–2021)

Chaconne in C minor
Dieterich Buxtehude (1637–1707)

Fantasia in A minor
William Byrd (d. 1623)

Four Extemporisations
Percy Whitlock (1903–1946)

  1. Fidelis
  2. Fanfare

Alleluias
Simon Preston (1938–2022)
